verses.text: Tua ciangin Job in dawng a
“A hehpihhuai kei nong huhna, a thazawngkhal kei nong hotna, hih bang ahi hiam
Kei bang mihai tungah thu manpha nong gen a, pilna thu tampi nong pulak hi
Tua bang thu a gen dingin kua in hong sawl a, kua' lungsim hong pulakkhia na hi hiam
“Misite' gam kiling a, a sunga a teng mite launa tawh a ling hi
Pasian' muhna-ah misite' gam kilang sinsen a, a muh theihlohna dingin a liah bangmah omlo hi
Pasian in mun awng tungah vanpi hong zalkhia a, bangmah in a lenlopi-in leitung a khai lingleng hi
Amah in meiilom lakah tuite khol a, tua a gik mahmah tui meii a puazosak hi
Amah in kha a liah ding bawl a, meii tawh kha a khuh hi
Amah in muh tawpna-ah git dinden a, khuavak leh khuamial a khen hi
Amah in vanpi a pua khuampite a taii ciangin tua khuampite lau-in a ling uh hi
Ama thahatna tawh tuipi zo a, ama siamna tawh tui ganhing golpi Rahab thatlum hi
A hu a san' ciangin vantung teng siang pah a, ama khut in a taikhia gulpi thatlum hi
Hihte pen ama vangliatna themkhat bek hi pan a, i zak thute pen a hemlam bek hi pan hi. Pasian a liatna taktak kua'n theizo ding ahi hiam?” a ci hi.
